subject: Gaming
title: Streaming: The Real Esports Economy
description: One-minute skill: Streaming: The Real Esports Economy.

hook.text: Top streamers earn more than most pro players. Streaming is where the real esports money flows.

buildup.text: Platforms like Twitch and YouTube pay creators through ads, subscriptions, and donations.

discovery.text: Pro players who stream build personal brands worth more than their competitive salaries.

twist.text: Some retired pros earn more streaming than they ever did competing. Entertainment beats competition.

climax.text: Streaming created a parallel economy where personality matters as much as skill.

punchline.text: Competing pays salaries. Streaming builds empires. Content is king.

quiz.question: How does streaming relate to esports earnings?
options: Top streamers often earn more than professional competitors
Streaming pays much less than competing
